scripts.build: bun run --filter '@i18nez/core' build && bun run --filter '@i18nez/react' build
scripts.test: bun run build && bun run --filter '@i18nez/*' test
scripts.typecheck: bun run build && bun run --filter '@i18nez/*' typecheck
scripts.link:all: cd packages/core && bun link && cd ../react && bun link
